task_updates.executor_notes: Updated the multi-generation path test to use the new atomic RPC contract, assert immediate cache hydration with thumbnail-bearing images, assert `includeShots: false`, and assert the old timer hack is gone. Added `upsertShotInCache` coverage for sorted insertion, replacement, and detail-cache writes. Final verification included a temporary repro test that confirmed the original missing-thumbnail/timer-glue failure mode is resolved, then ran the full `src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/` and `src/shared/hooks/shots/` modules plus `npx tsc --noEmit`; all passed. The old compatibility shim on `CreateShotWithGenerationsPathInput` was also removed so the final type surface matches the shipped wiring.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. The existing tests for `createShotWithGenerationPath`, `createShotWithFilesPath`, and `createEmptyShotPath` remained in place in `shotCreationPaths.test.ts` and still pass as part of the full `npx vitest run src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/` module run.
